title: Verify navigation to Home screen from Device screen
test_steps: Click on the back arrow in the header to navigate to the Home screen.
expected_result: The Home screen should be displayed.

title: Verify navigation to Garage screen from Device screen
test_steps: Click on the 'Garage' option in the vertical menu to navigate to the Garage screen.
expected_result: The Garage screen should be displayed.

title: Verify navigation to Lookup screen from Device screen
test_steps: Click on the 'Lookup' option in the vertical menu to navigate to the Lookup screen.
expected_result: The Lookup screen should be displayed.

title: Verify navigation to Trouble Codes screen from Device screen
test_steps: Click on the 'Trouble Codes' option in the vertical menu to navigate to the Trouble Codes screen.
expected_result: The Trouble Codes screen should be displayed.

title: Verify navigation to Engine Codes screen from Device screen
test_steps: Click on the 'Engine Codes' option in the vertical menu to navigate to the Engine Codes screen.
expected_result: The Engine Codes screen should be displayed.

title: Verify navigation to Equipment Codes screen from Device screen
test_steps: Click on the 'Equipment Codes' option in the vertical menu to navigate to the Equipment Codes screen.
expected_result: The Equipment Codes screen should be displayed.

title: Verify navigation to Settings screen from Device screen
test_steps: Click on the 'Settings' option in the vertical menu to navigate to the Settings screen.
expected_result: The Settings screen should be displayed.

title: Verify navigation to Device screen from Device screen
test_steps: Click on the 'Device' option in the vertical menu to navigate back to the Device screen.
expected_result: The Device screen should be displayed.

test_steps: Click on the 'About' option in the vertical menu to navigate to the About screen.
